purpose: Separate research, design, build, review, and print/publish notebooks so project work does not remain mixed across old sheets and chats.

notebookFamilies.title: Research notebooks
notebookFamilies.use: sources, evidence, context, and extracted thought trains

notebookFamilies.title: Design notebooks
notebookFamilies.use: brand, templates, route layouts, visual systems, and interface rules

notebookFamilies.title: Build notebooks
notebookFamilies.use: implementation state, package maps, configs, and test logs

notebookFamilies.title: Review notebooks
notebookFamilies.use: claim gates, source authority, public-safe review, and owner decisions

notebookFamilies.title: Print and publish notebooks
notebookFamilies.use: final unversioned surfaces, back-matter logs, and release notes

graphs.purpose: Show which notebook families have final unversioned pages and logs.
Show which thought trains are routed to docs, tasks, concept maps, or raw archive.

guardrails: unresolved notes require task routing before version closure
consolidated logs remain with each workbook or publish surface
internal proof and empirical validation remain separate
nextActions: Map current notebook and sheet pages into the five notebook families.
Create final unversioned page names before mutating any spreadsheet tabs.
Move unresolved row items into OPEN_TASKS before version closure.
